story: I want to open the dashboard so that I can review educational stock risk briefings with a visible disclaimer.
acceptance_criteria: Generated banner is referenced in index.html.
Stock cards include ticker, mock price, risk level, and briefing.

story: I want to inspect one supported ticker so that I can focus on a single educational briefing.
I want to add a supported ticker to my watchlist so that I can track examples I am studying.
I want to submit feedback so that the app demonstrates validated form handling.
acceptance_criteria: GET feedback returns the submitted item.

story: I want to inspect tests, Docker, CI, and evidence outputs so that I can assess the software workflow.
acceptance_criteria: CI workflow runs pytest and Docker build.
Task2 evidence file names are listed.
